text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
How's everything going with you-know-what,
Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're referring to when I broke the
doorknob! Well, since I put plants in my room like
you said to, I do feel more at peace!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's great! Houseplants are really effective
when it comes to calming bad qi. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And if you have any problems, Akebono, I can
use feng shui to help you out too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Me? Hmm... I don't think I'm struggling with
anything...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, actually...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hi-YAHHH! I must clean every nook and cranny!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: This is all for my friend! Yaaah! I really hope she wins!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Even the table's shiny now!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And the sink is sparkling!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: How's this, Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's looking good! By keeping your surroundings
clean, you can attract the luck you need to win! In
terms of feng shui, this is perfect!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! I feel like I'm one step closer to
getting a meal voucher for that famous sumo stew
joint! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I-I've just finished cleaning over here as well!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay, now that we're all here, let's try our luck!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Aww, that's too bad!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... The wall of probability was too thick to
smash through!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I knew we couldn't change the preset odds of
winning, but I thought if we could just change our
luck...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if we approached this with positive
qi then it might work out. I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's okay. ☆ And the cafe's spotless now, so
that's great!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's very true! And it was such good training
that my arms are throbbing!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text: Oh! There you are!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: U-us?

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
You three even got those stubborn oil stains out!
Thank you all so much.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I have a few meal vouchers for this place
my friend owns, so I'd like you to have them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, aren't these vouchers for that sumo stew
place?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Haha. ♪ Cleaning the place up really did
bring something good our way!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can call on you for help again sometime,
Rickey. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...So, that's what happened! I'm really glad I was
able to help them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before training, Copano Rickey shares a
heartwarming story about her and her classmates.
choice_data_list: You seized that luck with impressive vigor.
You seized that luck with impressive vigor.
Your feng shui knowledge sure came in handy!
Your feng shui knowledge sure came in handy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before training, Copano Rickey shares a
heartwarming story about her and her classmates.
choice_data_list: You seized that luck with impressive vigor.
You seized that luck with impressive vigor.
Your feng shui knowledge sure came in handy!
Your feng shui knowledge sure came in handy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Haha. ♪ Yeah, we did!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Those two are both so sunny, and they're strong,
too. I feel like just being around them gives me
strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All three of them are powerful in different ways,
and I imagine they have plenty of other things in
common too. I can't help hoping this trio's bond
stays strong.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! All the more reason to keep polishing my
feng shui skills!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want to use feng shui to bring heaps of
happiness to all my precious pals, after all! ♪
